metadata.description: Inference-time coherence and shadow detection for AI responses. Built by Lyra Labs.

plugins.name: lyra
plugins.description: Full coherence framework + shadow detection. Catches sycophancy, template behavior, presence theater, and measures response quality through the traffic light system — all without model retraining.
